texts.text: 3 RD  PERSON DISCOUNT - Per person rate is reduced to 50% if sharing a suite with 2 adults

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Terms and Conditions/ Cancellation Policy
texts.text: Terms and Conditions/ Cancellation Policy

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The following terms and conditions which are subject to change without notice apply to the services offered by and rates issued by Spirit of the Masai Mara Ltd ('the Company'). It is a condition of making a reservation with the Company that these terms and conditions are accepted in full and non-adherence to our terms & conditions may lead to withdrawal of contract rates and release of bookings.
texts.text: The following terms and conditions which are subject to change without notice apply to the services offered by and rates issued by Spirit of the Masai Mara Ltd ('the Company'). It is a condition of making a reservation with the Company that these terms and conditions are accepted in full and non-adherence to our terms & conditions may lead to withdrawal of contract rates and release of bookings.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Kenyan Law: It is a condition of making a reservation with the Company that the client agrees that these terms and conditions constitute a contract under Kenyan Law and the client agrees irrevocably to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Kenyan Courts and that in the event of any dispute or action of any kind against the Company that dispute or action shall be heard under Kenyan Law in the Kenyan Courts.
texts.text: Kenyan Law: It is a condition of making a reservation with the Company that the client agrees that these terms and conditions constitute a contract under Kenyan Law and the client agrees irrevocably to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Kenyan Courts and that in the event of any dispute or action of any kind against the Company that dispute or action shall be heard under Kenyan Law in the Kenyan Courts.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Insurance
texts.text: Insurance

texts.label: text
texts.orig: It is a condition of using the rates and services offered by the Company that all clients (including individuals, companies, and other legal entities) take out appropriate travel, medical and other insurance prior to departure of clients from their country of origin.
texts.text: It is a condition of using the rates and services offered by the Company that all clients (including individuals, companies, and other legal entities) take out appropriate travel, medical and other insurance prior to departure of clients from their country of origin.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A visit to our property and particularly a safari entails an element of risk and neither the Company nor its officers and employees shall be liable in any way for any loss or damages expense or cost arising from any incident involving clients (individuals, companies and other legal entities), including anything Covid-19 related, that may occur whilst using any of the services provided by the Company or third parties contracted by this company.
texts.text: A visit to our property and particularly a safari entails an element of risk and neither the Company nor its officers and employees shall be liable in any way for any loss or damages expense or cost arising from any incident involving clients (individuals, companies and other legal entities), including anything Covid-19 related, that may occur whilst using any of the services provided by the Company or third parties contracted by this company.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Guests should be aware that Spirit of the Masai Mara will require guests to sign indemnity forms.  If guests are not willing to sign these forms they will not be able to take part in certain activities, such as guided nature walks in the Siana Conservancy.
texts.text: Guests should be aware that Spirit of the Masai Mara will require guests to sign indemnity forms.  If guests are not willing to sign these forms they will not be able to take part in certain activities, such as guided nature walks in the Siana Conservancy.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: It is the responsibility of every client (including individuals, companies, and other legal entities) to assess their own insurance requirements and to organise appropriate insurance.
texts.text: It is the responsibility of every client (including individuals, companies, and other legal entities) to assess their own insurance requirements and to organise appropriate insurance.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the event of failure of any client (individual, company, or other legal entity) to comply with these insurance conditions and requirements or to organise appropriate insurance then neither the Company nor its officers or employees nor any third party contracted by this company shall be liable in any way for any loss or damages expenses or costs arising from any incident.
texts.text: In the event of failure of any client (individual, company, or other legal entity) to comply with these insurance conditions and requirements or to organise appropriate insurance then neither the Company nor its officers or employees nor any third party contracted by this company shall be liable in any way for any loss or damages expenses or costs arising from any incident.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Booking Terms/ Cancellations
texts.text: Booking Terms/ Cancellations

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All provisional bookings are given an automatic expiry date (normally 2 weeks from booking date). You are required to confirm the booking prior to the expiry date to avoid automatic release of the booking. If you require more time to confirm the booking, the expiry date may be extended on request.
texts.text: All provisional bookings are given an automatic expiry date (normally 2 weeks from booking date). You are required to confirm the booking prior to the expiry date to avoid automatic release of the booking. If you require more time to confirm the booking, the expiry date may be extended on request.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Bookings are confirmed upon receipt of a 50% deposit of the total reservation cost. The balance is payable in full 45 days prior to arrival.
texts.text: Bookings are confirmed upon receipt of a 50% deposit of the total reservation cost. The balance is payable in full 45 days prior to arrival.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the event of cancellation:
texts.text: In the event of cancellation:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: More than 120 days in advance: Full deposit is returned net of bank charges
texts.text: More than 120 days in advance: Full deposit is returned net of bank charges

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 120 - 46 days in advance: Full deposit is forfeited
texts.text: 120 - 46 days in advance: Full deposit is forfeited

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 45 - 31 days in advance: 50% of full amount is forfeited
texts.text: 45 - 31 days in advance: 50% of full amount is forfeited

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 30 - 0 days in advance: 100% of full amount is forfeited
texts.text: 30 - 0 days in advance: 100% of full amount is forfeited

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Spirit of the Masai Mara Ltd reserves the right to review published rates in the event of currency fluctuations or increases in taxes/levies/charges and costs that are beyond our control.
texts.text: Spirit of the Masai Mara Ltd reserves the right to review published rates in the event of currency fluctuations or increases in taxes/levies/charges and costs that are beyond our control.
